name: Dr Yan JIANG 蔣嚴 蒋严
title: Senior Lecturer in Linguistics and the Languages of China
department: School of Languages, Cultures and Linguistics
expertise_topics: Exploring why people differ in their understanding and interpretation of Covid-19
and whether these differences are related to the language
biography: Yan JIANG got his BA and MA degrees from Fudan University, Shanghai and PhD in linguistics from London University (UCL and SOAS). Before joining SOAS Linguistics in September, 2015, he had taught at Fudan University and the Hong Kong Polytechnic University. More details can be found on his website.
research_interests: Exploring why people differ in their understanding and interpretation of Covid-19; and whether these differences are related to the language; s people speak; read; and write; other than English
